input.task:
Build a simple workflow with:
1. A Manual Trigger node
2. A Set node named "approval test" (set any simple field, e.g. status = "approved")

No credentials needed.
input.conversationContext: User wants a simple workflow with a manual trigger and a Set node called "approval test". No credentials available on the instance.
input.reason: New simple workflow with manual trigger and a Set node — no plan needed.

output.result: Error: `bypassPlan: true` is for edits to an EXISTING workflow and requires a `workflowId`. New workflow builds must go through `plan` so an orchestrator-run verification checkpoint is scheduled. Call `plan` with a `build-workflow` task instead.

input.summary: Create and run a simple manual-trigger workflow with a Set node named "approval test".
assumptions: Workflow contains only a Manual Trigger and a single Set node with no specific fields required — builder will add a sample field to demonstrate output.

item.name: approval test
item.purpose: A minimal workflow triggered manually that passes data through a Set node. Used to verify basic workflow execution end-to-end.

item.title: Verify 'approval test' workflow runs successfully
item.instructions: Use verify-built-workflow with the work item ID from the 'wf-approval-test' build outcome. Confirm the execution completes without errors and the Set node produces at least one output item.
